note: Economy + material config for the Slag Run game (upstream of the Speciation Quest). Time is measured in game-days; 1 week = 1 game-day. Numbers are gameplay-tuned but grounded in real hydrometallurgy (finer comminution -> more surface area -> higher recovery AND faster leaching) and the real Dutch context (Ekoliet 0/8mm steel-slag aggregate; steel slag in Amsterdamse Bos path foundations and Zeeland/Oosterschelde bank protection). Blocks player/tanks/agitation/largeEquipment are forward-looking mechanics specced in docs/slag-run-game-design.md and tracked in the backlog; the v1 game + validator use research/feedstocks/comminution/leach/product.

research.title: Onderzoeksbudget staalslak-valorisatie
research.flavor: Big Chemistry Startup (Oost NL) — aanvraag voor vanadium-terugwinning uit staalslak. Toekenning duurt 4 weken.
research.note: Grant unlocks ordering graded ekoliet feedstock; foraging is free without it.

feedstocks.name: Ekoliet 0/8mm
feedstocks.note: Gecertificeerd Nederlands staalslak-granulaat (0/8mm), consistente V-graad; besteld op onderzoeksbudget.

feedstocks.name: Amsterdamse Bos (paden)
feedstocks.note: Staalslak uit padfunderingen opgraven; korte reis, kleine oogst, grovere brokken. Graven bouwt spiermassa.

feedstocks.name: Zeeland waterwallen (Oosterschelde)
feedstocks.note: Slak van de oeverbestorting oppakken; lange reis, grotere oogst, sterk verweerde grove brokken. Sjouwen bouwt spiermassa.

comminution.name: Handhamer
comminution.note: Gratis, traag, blijft grof (~8mm). Hameren bouwt spiermassa.

comminution.name: Balmolen + V/Cr-maalballen
comminution.note: Goedkoop apparaat, dure media; traag maar fijn tot 0.1mm.

comminution.name: Grote hamermolen
comminution.note: Hoge doorzet tot 2mm; verlaagt maaltijd per emmer sterk.

comminution.name: Grote balmolen
comminution.note: Hoge doorzet tot 0.1mm; combineert fijnheid met snelheid.

leach.note: Recovery vs. particle size (surface-area driven). Interpolated between points; finer = higher.

timeModel.note: Leach time scales with particle size: at 20 C the batch needs 1 game-day (1 week) per 0.1mm of the coarsest feed. So 0.1mm -> 1 day, 2mm -> 20 days, 8mm -> 80 days. Fine milling trades mill-time for a massive leach-time saving.

leach.liquidSolidNote: Vulvolume per batch ≈ slag_kg × L/S. Ontwerpwaarde 3 L/kg (bench-loging staalslak ~2–10 L/kg); begrenst batchgrootte op tankvolume. Zie docs/vanadium-recovery-from-steel-slag.md (L/S-lever).

tanks.name: Platte loogbak 80L
tanks.note: Lange bak; boven 40L vulling te slap/zwaar om op te tillen -> geen tilagitatie. emptyKg = ontwerpwaarde (leeg vat, flexibel kunststof).

tanks.name: Bak 40L
tanks.note: Halve lengte, hoger; volledige vulling nog optilbaar. emptyKg = ontwerpwaarde (leeg vat, flexibel kunststof).

agitation.note: Manual lift-agitation speeds/improves leaching but sloshes: some leachate is lost and the site is contaminated. Liftability is gated by fill volume (tank.liftableMaxFillL) AND player strength vs the filled weight (see player + physics).

slosh.note: Per manual agitation: ~3% leachate loss + 1 site-contamination point (cleanup cost / reputation).

player.strengthCapNote: Muscle mass grows with physical labour: digging (Amsterdamse Bos), hauling (Zeeland), hammering (hand hammer), and lifting tanks each add strength. Higher strength raises the mass you can lift.
player.liftForceModel: Max liftable mass (kg) ~ strength; a filled tank's mass = tank empty mass + fill_litres * bulk_density. Gravity g = 9.81 m/s^2 used for the effort/energy readout.

physics.note: Bulk density of granular steel slag ~1.6-2.0 kg/L; pregnant leach solution ~1.1-1.2 kg/L. Used to turn fill volume into a liftable weight the player's strength is checked against.

autoclave.name: Autoclaaf (druk/temp-loging)
autoclave.note: Pressure/temperature leaching: sharply higher recovery and far shorter leach time than 20 C atmospheric, without manual lift-agitation. Alternative capital-intensive route to the fine-mill+agitate path.

product.note: Recovered V mass -> V2O5 mass (stoichiometric). V2O5 output feeds the Speciation Quest electrolyte refinement.
product.kwhNote: Rough VRFB electrolyte capacity proxy for scoring.
